title: Disposition of fees collected; expenses
doc_html:
§114. Disposition of fees collected; expenses

            Out of funds collected under this Part the assistant secretary may pay expenses incurred in administering this Part. No expenses incurred by the assistant secretary in administering this Part shall be charged to the funds of the state. All excess funds generated shall annually be credited to the general fund of the treasury of the state.

            Acts 1981, No. 732, §1.
doc_text:
§114.  Disposition of fees collected; expenses
Out of funds collected under this Part the
assistant
secretary may pay
expenses incurred in administering this Part.  No expenses incurred by the
assistant
secretary in administering this Part shall be charged to the funds of the state.  All
excess funds generated shall annually be credited to the general fund of the treasury
of the state.
Acts 1981, No. 732, §1.
